citations.cited_text: Following the release of a landmark third English album on Friday (April 3), Monsta X is now expanding their new world tour to North America. Billboar...
citations.title: Monsta X 'THE X : NEXUS' 2026 World Tour North America Dates

content.text: Monsta X announced 10 new North American stops on their ongoing 2026 world tour, THE X : NEXUS, starting at EagleBank Arena in Fairfax, Va., on Oct. 3 and wrapping on Oct. 24 in Seattle, Wash.

All dates and venues below are corroborated by Ticketmaster and Billboard.
